channel.title: GRIDWATCH
channel.description: Outages x weather x data center proximity, Midwest to Atlantic

item.title: GRIDWATCH 2026-07-19T09:20Z — 1287 outages, 56,235 customers, 852 fair-weather, 11 DC-proximate
item.description: PA-PPL: 2493 cust (UNEXPLAINED FAIR-WEATHER) | VA-DOM: 1835 cust (UNEXPLAINED FAIR-WEATHER) | PA-NY: 1608 cust (UNEXPLAINED FAIR-WEATHER) | BGE: 1501 cust (UNEXPLAINED FAIR-WEATHER) | OH-AEP: 1500 cust (UNEXPLAINED FAIR-WEATHER)
